title: Start here
subtitle: Five Grade-A plugins that cover most first-day work in Claude Code. Install whichever match your stack.

plugins.name: ai-commit-gen
plugins.tagline: Conventional commit messages from any diff
plugins.why: Replaces the universal 'what should I write?' moment after staging changes. Read your diff, write the commit, ship.

plugins.name: conversational-api-debugger
plugins.tagline: Root-cause REST API failures from OpenAPI + HAR
plugins.why: The fastest path from 'this endpoint is broken' to a fix. Combines API spec + actual HTTP traffic into a debugging conversation.

plugins.name: ci-cd-pipeline-builder
plugins.tagline: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, et al. — generated
plugins.why: Cuts the 'I have to look up YAML syntax' tax on every new pipeline. Tell it what you want, get a working workflow.

plugins.name: design-to-code
plugins.why: Designer hands off a Figma file or a screenshot; you get production-ready components instead of pixel-pushing.

plugins.name: excel-analyst-pro
plugins.why: Bridges Claude Code into the spreadsheets your finance team lives in. Models, projections, sensitivity analysis without the formula chase.

meta.selection_criteria: Diverse coverage of common first-day-in-Claude-Code use cases (productivity, debugging, ops, frontend, business). All five score Grade A on the IS rubric.
meta.rotation_cadence: Quarterly — re-evaluated against marketplace install velocity once Phase 5B telemetry lands.
